---
title: "Week2_Day1_QC"
author: "Kimia Mansoori"
format: html
editor: visual
toc: true
---

```{r}
#| eval: false 
#| echo: false 
library(Rqc) 
library(fastqcr) 
library(QuasR) 
library(ShortRead) 
library(ggplot2)
library ("tidyverse")
print("All Bioconductor packages loaded successfully!")
```
